title: Kitchen Perfected Eco-Friendly Blue Illuminating Cordless Glass Kettle - 1.7Ltr, 2200w, Fast and Quiet Boil, 1 Cup in 60 seconds, Only boil what you need, BPA Free - E1401BS
features: RAPID BOIL: This kettle uses quiet fast boil technology and with super-fast heating means you can boil water within a few minutes. Suitable for both left hand and right handed users, the 360 degree base means the kettle is always within easy reach.

SPEEDY BREW: Saving you time and energy, you can enjoy a quick brew in a matter of minutes, you can boil up 1 cup (250 ml) in under 60 seconds and save up to 66 percent energy compared with the typical 1ltr that most users boil for 1 cup.

CAPACITY: 1.7 litre capacity will fill roughly 7 cups or mugs (each 250ml) which is ideal for families and with the clear glass has full markings for every cup fill so that you can add just the right amount of water you need for that round of hot drinks.

BLUE ILLUMINATION: The kettle provides a cool blue illumination whilst boiling. SAFE & CONVENIENT: The built-in boil dry protection and automatic shut - off settings added safety whilst in use. The 360 degrees base with cord storage is of easy accessibility.

ECO-FRIENDLY: Not only is the packaging fully recyclable with no plastic packing, reducing waste and protecting the environment and oceans, but you can also reduce your Carbon Footprint, by only boiling the exact amount of water needed for each drink. Saving electricity costs.
description: This KitchenPerfected Premium kettle boasts a sleek cordless design with a hinged lid and 360 degree rotating base for your convenience when refilling. You can boil a single cup in approx. 60 seconds, not only saving you time, but money on energy bills too! The large 1.7 litre capacity means you can make up to six cups at any one time, perfect for larger families. The kettle illuminates blue inside the kettle during the boiling process. The packaging contains no plastic bags, which helps protect our Oceans, and is fully recyclable. Doing our bit to save the planet! Boiling only the water you need can save up to 66% energy consumption, which reduces your Carbon footprint and both water windows show individual cup markings making it easier for you to select the desired amount of water, from 1 to 6 cups. For your safety, the kettle has been fitted with an automatic shut off feature to prevent the appliance from overheating after it has reached boiling point or if there isn't sufficient water present. The washable filter can be removed and refitted easily making it convenient for you to keep clean, combined with the concealed heating element, this will help to reduce the build up of impurities in the water Box Includes : KitchenPerfected 1.7Ltr 7 Cup Eco-Friendly Illuminated Glass Cordless Kettle Instruction Manual
